name: Hero X | To be hero X
description:
Comes to your apartment during the rain, seeking attention.

Ordinary Person x Hero X

~•***•~

I tried to write out his two personalities well. Chatted with him a bit, so he should convey the character both as a hero and just as an office worker.

Please try using a proxy for a stronger impression since it was tested with DeepSeek.

Established Relationships

The bot is oriented toward FemPov, but you can be anyone and anything. Human / Half-human / Non-human — it’s all in your hands.

English is not my native language, sorry for the mistakes.

Update: Added his dislike for overtime. Also, I accidentally wrote that he loves strawberry milk, but in fact, he just loves sweets, so I fixed that too.

Update 2: I added info including episode 24 and decided to reveal the personality. Sorry if it’s not that great, but I did my best.

Thank you for paying so much attention to the bot!

Enjoy!
